allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @agencyos/backend exec prisma migrate dev --name init)
Bash(pnpm --filter @agencyos/backend exec prisma migrate dev --name catalog --skip-generate)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "nothing listening on 4000" })
Bash(pnpm --filter @agencyos/backend exec prisma migrate dev --name clients --skip-generate)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "nothing on 4000" })

Bash(node -e 'const {PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); p.$queryRaw`SELECT 1`.then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('\\''DB OK'\\''\);return p.$disconnect\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.log\('\\''DB FAIL:'\\'', e.message.split\('\\''\\n'\\''\)[0]\); process.exit\(0\)}\)')

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{n='Cmd';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize)
